prompts.text: {vip}, it's your night! Take 2 sips to kick off the celebration.
{vip}, give out 3 sips to whoever cried first when they heard about the wedding.
{player1}, raise your glass to the happy couple! Take 2 sips.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever is most likely to cry at the ceremony.
{vip}, take 3 sips -- you're about to be MARRIED. Let that sink in.
{vip}, give out 2 sips to whoever traveled the farthest to be here tonight.
{vip}, count down from 3... First to shout out: What was {vip}'s first job? {vip} decides who's right. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s middle name? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.

{vip}, count down from 3... How did {vip2} propose (or how did they get engaged)? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip2}'s pet name for {vip}? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips. Embarrassing answers encouraged.
{vip}, count down from 3... What do {vip} and {vip2} argue about the most? {vip} decides who nailed it. Winner gives out 3 sips.

{vip}, count down from 3... How long have {vip} and {vip2} been together? Closest answer gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip2}'s most annoying habit according to {vip}? {vip} decides who got it. Winner gives out 4 sips.

{vip2}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s most annoying habit according to {vip2}? {vip2} decides who got it. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip2}, count down from 3... Who is the messier one -- {vip} or {vip2}? {vip2} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip2}, count down from 3... What's the most romantic thing {vip} has ever done? {vip2} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What does {vip2} do that makes {vip} melt? {vip} decides who got it. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's the biggest compromise {vip} made for this wedding? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip2}, count down from 3... Who takes longer to get ready -- {vip} or {vip2}? {vip2} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip2}'s guilty pleasure that only {vip} knows about? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip2}, count down from 3... What Netflix show have {vip} and {vip2} binged together the most? {vip2} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... Who is more likely to forget their anniversary -- {vip} or {vip2}? {vip} decides. Honest answer = 2 sips to the forgetful one.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was the first gift {vip2} ever gave {vip}? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip2}, count down from 3... What was the biggest fight {vip} and {vip2} ever had? {vip2} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips. Spill the tea.
{vip}, count down from 3... Who hogs the blanket? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip2}, count down from 3... Who is the early bird and who is the night owl? {vip2} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, truth time: What's the most embarrassing thing you've done in front of {vip2}? Take 2 sips after confessing.
{vip}, what's one thing you haven't told {vip2} yet? Spill it. Take 2 sips for courage.
{vip}, what was your honest first impression of {vip2}'s family? Take 3 sips and tell the truth.
{vip}, what's one wedding tradition you secretly think is dumb? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, what's the most bridezilla/groomzilla moment you've had? Own it. Take 2 sips.
{vip}, who almost didn't make the guest list? Don't name names... or do. Take 3 sips.
{vip}, what's the one thing about single life you'll miss? Take 2 sips and be honest.
{vip}, what was the worst wedding planning fight about? Take 3 sips.
{vip}, who in this room has seen you at your worst? Point to them. Both drink 2 sips.
{vip}, what song will you ugly cry to at the wedding? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, describe {vip2} in 3 words. Take 1 sip per word. Choose wisely.
{vip}, what's the most expensive thing you bought for this wedding that {vip2} doesn't know about? Take 3 sips.
{vip}, what's one thing you'd change about {vip2} if you could? Take 3 sips. Careful now.
{vip}, rate {vip2}'s dancing on a scale of 1-10. Be honest. Take that many sips divided by 2.
{vip}, what's the most romantic thing {vip2} has ever done for you? Take 2 sips and make everyone jealous.
{vip}, what habit of {vip2}'s drives you absolutely insane? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, who in this room gives the best relationship advice? Point to them. They give out 3 sips.
{vip}, what's one thing about the wedding you wish you could redo? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, cold feet moment: did you ever have one? Take 3 sips regardless.
{vip}, who was the first person you told when you got engaged? If they're here, they give out 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who can name more things they love about the other in 15 seconds? Loser takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who's the better dancer? Show us. Group votes. Loser takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who said 'I love you' first? If you disagree, both drink 4 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who takes longer to get ready? Group decides. Loser takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who is the bigger spender? Be honest. The spendy one takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who is the better cook? Group votes (or taste test). Loser takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who apologizes first after a fight? The stubborn one takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Name things you love about each other. Go back and forth. First to hesitate drinks 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who is more likely to cry at the ceremony? Group votes. Most likely takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who snores louder? The other one decides. Snorer takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who has the better taste in music? Group votes. Loser takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who is more likely to forget their anniversary? Group votes. Forgetful one takes 4 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Compliment battle. Go back and forth with compliments about each other. First to hesitate or get cheesy takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who is the messier one? Group decides. The messy one takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who would survive longer on a deserted island? Group votes. The survivor gives out 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who has the worse morning breath? Both point at the same time. If you point at each other, both drink 3.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who texts back faster? Be honest. Slow texter takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who has the better family? CAREFUL. Both take 2 sips for safety.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who is more dramatic? On 3, point. If you point at each other, both drink 3.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who is more likely to plan a surprise trip? Group decides. The planner gives out 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Who controls the TV remote? The other confirms. Remote hog takes 3 sips.
{vip} vs {vip2}: Kiss for 10 seconds. Group counts. Too short? Both take 5 sips.
{player1}, give a 10-second toast to {vip}. Bad toast? Group votes -- fail and take 3 sips.
{player1}, tell your favorite memory with {vip}. If {vip} doesn't remember it, you take 3 sips.
{player1}, give the couple one piece of marriage advice. If it's terrible, take 3 sips (group votes).
{player1}, say something nice about {vip2}. If {vip} says it's not nice enough, take 3 sips.
{player1}, tell the group how you met {vip}. Best story so far? Give out 3 sips. Boring? Take 3.
{player1}, roast {vip} in 15 seconds. If {vip} laughs, give out 3 sips. If they don't, take 4.
{player1}, give a one-word description of {vip} and {vip2}'s relationship. If the couple disagrees, take 3 sips.
{player1}, say one thing {vip} does better than anyone. If {vip} agrees, give out 2 sips.
{player1}, tell us {vip}'s best quality. If you stall, take 3 sips.
{player1}, predict one thing about {vip}'s married life. If {vip} cringes, take 3 sips.
{player1}, give the best man / maid of honor speech in 20 seconds. Group votes. Fail = 4 sips.
{player1}, say something you've never told {vip}. If it makes them emotional, give out 3 sips.
{player1}, propose a toast with a made-up word. If it doesn't make sense, take 3 sips.
{player1}, finish this sentence about {vip}: 'The thing I'll miss most about single {vip} is...' If {vip} agrees, give out 3 sips.
{player1}, tell the group one embarrassing story about {vip}. If {vip} didn't want that shared, {player1} takes 4 sips.
{player1}, what's one song that reminds you of {vip}? If {vip} hates it, take 3 sips.
{player1}, stand up and give a dramatic reading of a fake wedding vow. Group rates it. Under 7/10? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, tell the couple what you think their couple name should be. If they hate it, take 3 sips.
{player1}, roast {vip2} in 15 seconds. If {vip2} laughs, give out 3 sips. No laugh? Take 4.
{player1}, tell the group what you think the couple's first fight as a married couple will be about. If the couple agrees, give out 4 sips.
{player1}, take 2 sips for every wedding you've been to this year.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever caught a bouquet.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you're wearing something borrowed.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you cried at any point during the planning process.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever been a bridesmaid or groomsman.
{player1}, take 3 sips if your wedding gift was under $50. We see you.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you have the bride or groom's number saved with a nickname.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever ugly cried at a wedding.
{player1}, take 2 sips for every ex of {vip}'s that you know about.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've rehearsed your toast more than 3 times.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you've ever objected at a wedding. Even in your head.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you secretly think you could plan a better wedding.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you're wearing heels and already regretting it.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've already cried today.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you have more than 3 wedding photos on your phone already.
{player1}, take 3 sips if this is the first time you've met someone at this table tonight.
{player1}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever is most likely to cry at the ceremony.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever has been single the longest at this table.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever is next to get married (group prediction).
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever is most likely to give an embarrassing speech.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever {vip} has known the longest.
{vip}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever almost didn't make it tonight.
{vip}, give 3 sips to whoever you want. No explanation needed. It's your day.
{vip}, give out 2 sips to your favorite person at this table. Stir the drama.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever would give the worst best man/maid of honor speech.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever is dancing the hardest tonight.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever traveled the farthest to be here.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever is most likely to lose their shoes by the end of the night.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever thinks they could plan a wedding in a week.
{vip}, give out {sip_count} sips to the person who helped the most with wedding planning.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever is most likely to hook up at this wedding.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever has the most wedding photos on their phone.
{vip}, give 3 sips to whoever you think gives the best hugs.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever is most likely to make a scene on the dance floor.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever brought the cheapest wedding gift. No shame.
{vip}, give out 3 sips to whoever knows your ring size. If no one does, everyone drinks 2.
{player1}, give 2 sips to whoever is most likely to catch the bouquet.
{player1}, give out 3 sips to whoever has known the couple the longest.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever would be the worst wedding DJ.
{vip}, give 3 sips to whoever made you the most nervous about this party.
{player1}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever has caught a garter before.
{vip}, give out 4 sips however you want. Consider it a wedding tax.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever is most likely to request 'Don't Stop Believin' at the reception.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever would plan the wildest honeymoon.
Everyone who has cried at a wedding before -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has been in the couple's life for over 5 years -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who has caught a bouquet or garter -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has ever been a bridesmaid or groomsman -- take 1 sip per time.
Everyone who helped with wedding planning -- give out 2 sips. You earned it.
Everyone who thinks they'll cry at the ceremony -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has ever been to a destination wedding -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who knows {vip}'s middle name -- give out 2 sips. Don't know it? Take 3.
Everyone who has ever gotten too drunk at a wedding -- take 3 sips. Here we go again.
Everyone wearing something blue -- give out 1 sip.
Everyone who has ever slow-danced at a wedding -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has been friends with {vip} for over 10 years -- give out 3 sips.
Everyone who has ever been in a wedding party -- take 2 sips per wedding.
Everyone who has ever hooked up at a wedding -- take 3 sips. We don't judge.
Everyone who has a speech prepared for tonight -- take 2 sips for courage.
Everyone who has {vip}'s number saved with a heart emoji -- show us or take 3 sips.
Everyone who has seen {vip} ugly cry -- take 2 sips and don't you dare share.
Everyone who has ever been to a wedding where someone objected -- take 3 sips and tell us.
Everyone take 2 sips for the happy couple. No exceptions.
Everyone who has known {vip} since childhood -- give out 3 sips.
Everyone who thinks they could drink {vip} under the table -- take 3 sips to prove it.
Everyone who RSVPed late -- take 3 sips. You know who you are.
Everyone who has met {vip}'s parents -- give out 1 sip.
Everyone who doesn't know what the couple's first dance song is -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has a photo with {vip} from more than 5 years ago -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who traveled over 100 miles to be here -- give out 3 sips. Respect the dedication.
Everyone who thinks they'll be on the dance floor all night -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who has given the couple unsolicited advice -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has already taken more than 10 photos tonight -- give out 1 sip.
Everyone who is wearing uncomfortable shoes -- take 2 sips. Beauty is pain.
Everyone wearing jewelry the couple gave them -- give out 3 sips.
Everyone who knows the couple's anniversary date -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone raise your glass: to {vip}! Everyone drinks 2 sips.
Everyone who has drunk-texted {vip} before -- take 3 sips.
On 3, point to who will cry first at the ceremony. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who is next to get engaged. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who has known {vip} the longest. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who will catch the bouquet. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who would give the most embarrassing wedding toast. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to who {vip} has been friends with the longest. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who is most likely to request a slow dance. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who would plan the best bachelor/bachelorette party. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who looks like they've already cried tonight. Most pointed-at takes 2 sips.
On 3, point to who is {vip}'s ride or die. They give out 4 sips.
On 3, point to who would throw the most chaotic wedding. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who is most likely to drop the ring. Most pointed-at takes 4 sips.
On 3, point to who is secretly jealous of the couple. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who will send the first 'congrats' text after the honeymoon. They give out 2 sips.
On 3, point to who will be the most emotional during the vows. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who is the best storyteller at this table. They give out 3 sips and tell a story about {vip}.
On 3, point to who has the most embarrassing photo of {vip}. They give out 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can say the nicest thing about {vip}? {vip} judges. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has known {vip} longer? Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name love songs back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has been to more weddings? Fewer = take 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has the better wedding outfit? {vip} decides. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name romantic movies back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can give the better 5-second toast? Group votes. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has the better dance move? Show us. {vip} judges. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name types of flowers used in weddings. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has the better wedding toast voice? Group votes. Loser drinks 3.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name famous couples (real or fictional). First to fail takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has a better photo of {vip} on their phone? Show the group. Loser drinks 3.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name wedding traditions. Go back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who would {vip} call at 3 AM? {vip} decides. The other takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Compliment {vip} back and forth. First to hesitate drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who knows {vip}'s phone number by heart? If neither, both drink 3.
{vip} is the Queen/King. For the next {rule_turns} rounds, say 'Your Majesty' when addressing them. Forget = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: {vip} is no longer royalty. Back to earth.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, no one can say the word 'wedding.' Say it and take 2 sips.
For the next {rule_turns} rounds, everyone must toast before drinking. No toast = 2 extra sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: No more mandatory toasts. Drink in peace.

prompts.text: {vip} makes a rule. Everyone must follow it for {rule_turns} rounds. Break it = 2 sips.
For the next {rule_turns} rounds, every time someone says '{vip}' or '{vip2}' they take 1 sip.
prompts.rule_end_text: Name rule is over. Say their names freely.

prompts.text: {vip} picks a drinking buddy. For the next {rule_turns} rounds, whenever {vip} drinks, the buddy drinks too.
prompts.rule_end_text: {vip}'s drinking buddy is released. You're free.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, everyone must speak in a wedding announcer voice. Normal voice = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Wedding announcer voice is retired. Speak normally.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, before anyone drinks, they must say 'for the happy couple!' Skip it = 2 extra sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: No more dedications required. Drink selfishly.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, every compliment must be directed at {vip}. Compliment anyone else = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Compliment rule is over. Spread the love around.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, you must wink at {vip} before taking a sip. Forget = 2 extra sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Winking rule is done. Your eye can rest.

prompts.text: {vip2} makes a rule. It lasts {rule_turns} rounds. Break it = 2 sips.
Heaven! Last person to raise their glass drinks 3 sips. To the happy couple!
Waterfall! Everyone starts drinking. You can only stop when the person to your right stops. {vip} starts.
Group photo! Everyone pose. Last person in position takes 3 sips.
Dance break! Everyone dance for 10 seconds. Worst dancer (group votes) takes 3 sips.
Kiss cam! {vip} and {vip2}, kiss! Everyone else drinks 2 sips while you do.
Everyone stand and raise your glass. Say one word about the couple. Go around. Last person drinks 3 sips.
Musical chairs! Play the next song on someone's phone. When {vip} says stop, last to sit takes 4 sips.
{vip} picks someone to shotgun a drink with them. If either quits, the quitter takes 4 sips.
Bouquet toss simulation! Everyone put a hand in. {vip} counts down from 3. Last hand in takes 3 sips.
Champagne toast! Everyone take 3 sips together. No exceptions. For love!
Best man, stand up. Give a 30-second preview of your speech. Not ready? Take 4 sips.
Maid of honor, what is the most embarrassing thing {vip} has ever done? No story? Take 4 sips.
Best man, what is one thing about {vip2} that {vip} definitely does not know? Spill it or take 5 sips.
Bridesmaids, stand up. Each of you say one word to describe {vip}. Repeat a word? Take 3 sips.
Groomsmen, stand up. Each of you share one thing {vip2} said about {vip} before they started dating. Nothing? Take 3 sips each.
Maid of honor, when did you first know {vip} was serious about {vip2}? Tell the story or take 4 sips.
Best man, rate {vip2}'s romantic skills 1-10 based on what you've witnessed. Explain your score. {vip2} takes that many sips.
Bridesmaids vs. groomsmen: which group can name more details about the proposal? Losing side takes 3 sips each.
Maid of honor, finish this sentence: "The thing I will miss most about single {vip} is..." Take 2 sips after.
Best man, what is {vip2}'s worst habit that {vip} is about to deal with forever? {vip2} takes 3 sips of truth.
Everyone who knew {vip} before age 18 — take 2 sips. You have stories and we all know it.
Everyone who met {vip} in college — take 2 sips. Now tell the group one thing {vip} was like back then.
Everyone who met {vip2} through work — take 2 sips. Did you see this wedding coming? Be honest.
Everyone who has known {vip} for over 10 years — take 2 sips. Now tell the group how {vip} has changed the most.
{vip}'s family members — take 2 sips. Now share one thing about {vip} as a kid that nobody here knows.
{vip2}'s family members — take 2 sips. What was your first impression of {vip} when {vip2} brought them home?
Who at this table has known {vip} the longest? Stand up. Now tell us something about {vip} from before anyone else here knew them. Take 2 sips for the honor.
Who at this table has known {vip2} the longest? Stand up. Tell the group one story about young {vip2}. Take 2 sips.
On 3, hold up fingers for how many kids you think {vip} and {vip2} will have. {vip} reveals their real answer. Everyone wrong takes 2 sips.
On 3, point to who will be the strict parent — {vip} or {vip2}. Couple reveals the real answer. Wrong side takes 3 sips.
Everyone write down (or say) where you think {vip} and {vip2} will be living in 5 years. Couple reveals. Everyone wrong takes 2 sips.
On 3, point to who will say "I told you so" more in the marriage — {vip} or {vip2}? Couple decides. Wrong side takes 3 sips.
Everyone guess what {vip} and {vip2}'s first big argument as a married couple will be about. Best answer (couple decides) gives out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who will be the first to cry at the wedding — {vip} or {vip2}? Take 2 sips if you picked wrong.
Everyone guess what {vip} and {vip2}'s first big purchase as a married couple will be. Couple reveals. Everyone wrong takes 2 sips.
On 3, point to who will hog the covers — {vip} or {vip2}? Couple decides. Wrong side takes 2 sips.
First to shout it out: What does "something old, something new, something borrowed, something blue" originally represent? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: Good luck charms for the bride. "Old" = continuity with the past, "New" = optimism for the future, "Borrowed" = borrowed happiness from a happily married friend, "Blue" = fidelity and love. The rhyme dates back to Victorian England.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Why does the groom traditionally stand on the right side of the altar? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: So his sword hand (right hand) is free to defend the bride from rival suitors. This dates back to medieval times when brides were sometimes kidnapped.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Why do we throw rice (or birdseed) at weddings? Winner gives out 2 sips.
prompts.answer: It symbolizes fertility and prosperity for the couple. The tradition comes from ancient Rome where guests threw wheat at the bride.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What is the origin of the best man tradition? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: In ancient Germanic cultures, the best man was literally the best swordsman. His job was to help the groom kidnap the bride and fight off her family. The "best" man was the best fighter.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Why does the bride traditionally carry a bouquet? Winner gives out 2 sips.
prompts.answer: Originally, brides carried bouquets of herbs and spices (not flowers) to ward off evil spirits and mask body odor. The floral bouquet is a relatively modern tradition.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What is the average cost of a wedding in the US? Closest guess wins and gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: Approximately $35,000-$40,000 as of 2024-2025, though this varies wildly by region. New York and California average much higher.

prompts.text: First to shout it out: Why do we clink glasses to get the couple to kiss? Winner gives out 2 sips.
prompts.answer: It comes from medieval tradition where guests clinked glasses so vigorously that drinks would splash between cups — this proved no one had poisoned the drinks. The kissing tradition evolved later as a way to "prove love."

prompts.text: First to shout it out: What is the traditional order of wedding anniversary gifts for years 1, 5, and 10? Winner gives out 3 sips.
prompts.answer: Year 1 = Paper, Year 5 = Wood, Year 10 = Tin/Aluminum. The tradition dates back to medieval Germany where husbands would gift their wives silver at 25 years and gold at 50.

prompts.text: {player1}, show the group the oldest photo you have of {vip} on your phone. No photo? Take 4 sips. Good photo? Give out 3.
{player1}, tell the group the story of how you first met {vip}. No story? You clearly don't know them well enough — take 4 sips.
{player1}, show the group the oldest photo you have of {vip2} on your phone. No photo? Take 4 sips.
{player1}, what is your favorite memory with {vip}? Tell it in 30 seconds. Refuse? Take 4 sips.
Everyone pull up a photo of {vip} and {vip2} on your phone. No photo? Take 3 sips. Best photo (couple decides) gives out 3 sips.
{player1}, when did you first realize {vip} and {vip2} were going to end up together? Tell the moment. Take 2 sips.
Bride's side vs. groom's side: which group can name more places {vip} and {vip2} have traveled together? Losing side takes 3 sips each.
Bride's side vs. groom's side: which group knows the couple's anniversary? First side to shout it wins. Losers take 3 sips.
Bride's side vs. groom's side: which group can name more of the couple's inside jokes or habits? Losing side takes 3 sips each.
Bride's side — hold up fingers for how well you know {vip2} on a scale of 1-5. Groom's side, same for {vip}. Lowest average side takes 2 sips each.
Bride's side: name {vip2}'s middle name. Groom's side: name {vip}'s middle name. Wrong? Your whole side takes 3 sips.
Parents of {vip} — what is one thing about {vip} as a child that would surprise everyone here? Share or take 4 sips.
Parents of {vip2} — what was your first impression of {vip} when you met them? Be honest. Take 2 sips.
Any siblings of {vip} here? Share one childhood story about {vip} that they hoped you'd never tell. Take 2 sips for your service.
Any siblings of {vip2} here? When {vip2} first told you about {vip}, what did you think? Honest answers only. Take 2 sips.
Family members of {vip} and {vip2} — take 2 sips. You've earned it. Now share one piece of marriage advice for the couple.
